news.headline: OCP will release Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 20, 2025, available on OCP Intralinks portal at 9:00 a.m. EST.
news.summary: OCP S.A., a leading company in the fertilizer industry, will announce its Q4 and full-year 2024 results on March 20, 2025. The information will be accessible to the Company's bondholders, qualified institutional buyers, analysts, and market makers via the OCP Intralinks portal at 9:00 a.m. EST, 1:00 p.m. in Morocco and London (GMT). Senior management from OCP will conduct a conference call to review the fourth-quarter performance.

news.headline: IperionX releases interim financial report for six months ending Dec 31, 2024 in Charlotte, NC. #IPX
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, IperionX has released its Interim Financial Report covering the period of six months ending on December 31, 2024. This report provides a snapshot of the company's financial performance during this timeframe. Key financial figures and data are included in this report to offer stakeholders insight into the company's financial health and trajectory. The report covers important metrics such as revenue, expenses, profits, and other financial indicators for the specified period. It serves as a crucial tool for investors, analysts, and others interested in tracking IperionX's financial status and performance.

Binance CEO praises Trump's pro-crypto policies for inspiring global regulatory changes, noting US now openly supportive.
news.summary: At a CONVERGE LIVE event in Singapore, Binance CEO Richard Teng expressed optimism about the impact of pro-cryptocurrency policies introduced by U.S. President Donald Trump. Teng noted a significant shift in global financial dynamics, highlighting the U.S., the world's largest economy, openly supporting digital currencies after years of uncertainty and skepticism under the previous administration. This change signifies a pivotal moment for an industry that faced challenges during Joe Biden's tenure. Teng, alongside HashKey Capital CEO Chao Deng, commended the current U.S. leadership, suggesting industry players overwhelmingly support Trump's approach over past stringent oversight measures. Deng also noted that Trump's policies are driving a surge in institutional and retail enthusiasm for cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Kopin Corp (NASDAQ: KOPN) will attend 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 16-18, 2025. CEO to meet investors.
news.summary: Kopin Corporation, a key player in application-specific optical systems and high-performance microdisplays spanning various sectors, disclosed participation in the upcoming 37th Annual Roth Conference from March 16 to March 18, 2025. The company's CEO, Michael Murray, is slated to engage with investors at the event. To secure a one-on-one session with Murray, interested parties can register accordingly. Kopin Corporation is listed as NASDAQ: KOPN and caters to defense, training, enterprise, industrial, consumer, and medical markets.

news.headline: Ingenovis Health and Findd join forces for data-driven staffing solutions in healthcare, improving patient care.
news.summary: A new collaboration has been formed between Ingenovis Health and Findd to offer enhanced staffing solutions to healthcare organizations across the country. This exclusive partnership combines the expertise of both companies to provide data-driven tools that can help improve workforce planning, retention rates, and patient care outcomes. Through this alliance, healthcare leaders can access smarter staffing solutions that aim to reduce labor costs and optimize operations.

Sun Communities, Inc. nominates Mark Denien as director candidate for election to Board of Directors. NYSE: SUI.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Sun Communities, Inc. disclosed that Mr. Mark A. Denien has been nominated by its Board of Directors as an independent director candidate for the upcoming annual shareholder meeting. Sun Communities, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the symbol SUI.

news.headline: SLB announces early tender results & Exchange Offer amendment for up to $2B of SISA notes.
news.summary: Schlumberger Limited (SLB) disclosed today the preliminary outcomes of early tenders and modification of offers by Schlumberger Holdings Corporation, an indirect wholly owned subsidiary of SLB, to swap specific series of notes issued by Schlumberger Investment S.A. (SISA), known as Existing SISA Notes. The offer involves an exchange for a maximum aggregate principal amount of $2,000,000,000, as modified. SLB is listed on NYSE with the ticker symbol SLB.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick cites limits for US cars sales in South Korea and Japan.
DOGE layoffs expected to increase jobless claims; shutdown looming. S&P 500 futures slip.
news.summary: It is expected that there will be a rise in initial jobless claims as layoffs at DOGE are anticipated to commence. As shutdown concerns loom, S&P 500 futures have shown a slip. Additionally, the Producer Price Index (PPI) data is set to be released soon. The situation suggests potential challenges for the job market, with an unknown number of individuals facing unemployment as a result of the DOGE layoffs. This unfolding scenario is also impacting the stock market, with S&P 500 futures reflecting a decline in response to the news.

VCI Global plans market dominance strategy for 2025 expansion in Asia, Middle East to expand presence.
news.summary: A company has outlined strategic growth initiatives to enhance its market presence in Asia and the Middle East. These plans involve investing $50 million in expanding operations and launching new products in the region. The company aims to increase its customer base by 30% and generate $100 million in revenue within the next two years. This expansion effort will create around 500 new job opportunities, further solidifying the company's position in these key markets.

news.headline: Aaron Trentacosta promoted to Chief Operating Officer at Digital Matrix Systems in Plano, Texas.
news.summary: A promotion has been announced at Digital Matrix Systems in Plano, Texas, with Aaron Trentacosta being named as the new Chief Operating Officer.

Baker Hughes secures contract to provide power to U.S. data centers from TURBINE-X Energy Inc., using NovaLT™ gas turbine technology.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Baker Hughes, a leading energy technology company, revealed that TURBINE-X Energy Inc. had granted them an award for their NovaLT™ gas turbine technology. This technology aims to tackle the increasing power needs within the data center sector. Notably, earlier this month Baker Hughes also disclosed plans to collaborate with Frontier Infrastructure. This partnership is intended to offer essential carbon capture and storage (CCS) solutions along with power generation technologies tailored for both data center enterprises and industrial clientele.

news.headline: Company presents preclinical data on CER-1236 targeting ovarian cancer cells with no toxicities at 2025 SITC meeting.
news.summary: CERo Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. made a notable announcement on March 13, 2025, about their presentation at the 2025 SITC Spring Scientific Cellular Therapy for Solid Tumors event in San Diego. The company, listed as Nasdaq: CERO, disclosed promising preclinical data regarding their primary drug candidate, CER-1236, specifically targeting ovarian cancer. CERo, known for their innovative immunotherapy solutions utilizing phagocytic mechanisms, aims to advance engineered T cell therapeutics. The event took place from March 12 to March 14, showcasing the potential of CER-1236 for the treatment of ovarian cancer.

ICL files 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F, includes Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures, highlights climate change mitigation efforts.
news.summary: Tel Aviv-based company ICL, listed on NYSE (ICL) and TASE (ICL), a prominent global specialty minerals firm, revealed its submission of the annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The report comprises the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD) information for the fourth consecutive year, outlining ICL's actions to address climate change risks and cut its carbon emissions.

news.headline: Foresight partners with Excava in India for potential revenue of $19.5M by 2029, focusing on manufacturing and sales.
news.summary: A notable Indian Tier-One Supplier, Excava, and Foresight have plans to form a partnership or joint venture within India to focus on manufacturing and sales ventures. Foresight will oversee technology and knowledge transfer, while Excava will manage manufacturing and sales operations in the Indian market. This initiative aims to boost production and sales in India by leveraging each company's strengths.

news.headline: Intellicheck (Nasdaq: IDN) to report Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 20, 2025. Earnings call at 4:30 p.m. ET. Call 877-407-8037 to listen.
news.summary: Intellicheck, Inc. (Nasdaq: IDN), a prominent identity verification company, will announce its financial results on March 20, 2025, for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company is scheduled to hold an earnings conference call on March 20 at 4:30 p.m. ET/1:30 p.m. PT to review its operating performance. To tune in to the earnings conference call, dial 877-407-8037.

news.headline: ValidaTek launches vSET team in March 2025 to improve government efficiency & mission success through innovative solutions.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia on March 13, 2025, ValidaTek, Inc introduced its ValidaTek Solutions Engineering and Transformation (vSET) Team. This new initiative aims to heighten government contract assistance by leveraging innovative problem-solving, technical prowess, and specialized skills.

news.headline: North Boulder Dental in Boulder, Colorado, launched a new website on March 12, 2025. Visit https://www.boulderdental.com for improved user experience.
news.summary: North Boulder Dental in Boulder, Colorado, revealed the unveiling of its updated website on March 12, 2025. The new website, accessible at https://www.boulderdental.com, aims to enhance user experience for patients seeking dental services. The redesigned site provides easier access for patients to obtain information and services.

DSD Business Systems buys Klear Systems' Sage 100 clients, now supporting exclusively, effective Jan 1, 2025.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in San Diego, DSD Business Systems made a statement about acquiring Klear Systems' Sage 100 clientele. Effective from January 1, 2025, the Sage 100 users now receive support solely from DSD. DSD is recognized as a Diamond Sage Business Partner and Sage Tech Partner with more than 40 years of experience in the industry.

news.headline: Four Seasons hosts tennis tournaments with champion coaches like Venus Williams at luxury destinations.
news.summary: In an extraordinary event, a series of tournaments showcases renowned tennis coaches such as Venus Williams in stunning global locations. This initiative combines sport, fashion, and superior hospitality. The announcement was made in Toronto on March 13, 2025, highlighting a unique blend of elegance and athleticism.

news.headline: NDAY Security introduces innovative AttackN platform with AI-powered ethical hacking for cybersecurity. #CybersecurityRevolution
news.summary: In Miami on March 13, 2025, NDAY Security, also known as NDAY™, is making waves in the cybersecurity sector. The company, guided by ex-Big Four, Trustwave SpiderLabs, and Secureworks specialists, is transforming the industry with impressive upgrades to its main platform, AttackN. This innovative system aims to make ethical hacking more accessible to all users, with a focus on improved security measures.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: Steel and aluminum are needed for national security.
Startek wins Bronze Stevie Award for customer experience excellence, highlighting commitment to CX innovation. (101)
news.summary: Startek, a leading global provider of digital customer experience solutions, was recently recognized for its dedication to innovation in customer experience and digital transformation. The company received a Bronze Stevie® Award at the 2025 Stevie Awards for Sales. This prestigious accolade highlights Startek's commitment to excellence in CX, showcasing their continued success in delivering outstanding customer service. The award ceremony took place in Denver on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: QDOBA sees franchise growth with 500+ commitments, 33+ new restaurants planned, and aims for more.
news.summary: A series of multi-unit franchise groups are driving expansion plans for QDOBA, the second-leading Mexican fast-casual restaurant brand in the U.S. With a total of over 33 new restaurants in the pipeline, the company is set for substantial growth. The latest agreements indicate a strong commitment to further expansion beyond the current developments.
